scripts.dev1: concurrently "npm run dev -w host" "npm run dev -w remote-products"
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w packages/host" "npm run dev -w packages/remote-products" "npm run dev -w packages/remote-cart" "npm run dev -w packages/remote-orders"
scripts.build:all: npm run build -w packages/remote-products && npm run build -w packages/remote-cart && npm run build -w packages/remote-orders && npm run build -w packages/host
